title: Convert legacy module syntax to Move 2024 file-level form
prompt: Update sources/legacy.move to use the Move 2024 file-level module syntax. Do not change function bodies; only change the module declaration form.

title: Migrate to @mysten/sui v2 JSON-RPC client
prompt: Update src/index.ts to use the @mysten/sui v2 SDK. The 1.x SuiClient is deprecated; switch to SuiJsonRpcClient from @mysten/sui/jsonRpc and pass the now-required network parameter (mainnet).

title: Implement the one-time-witness pattern for a currency module
prompt: Implement the one-time-witness (OTW) pattern in sources/demo.move so the coin::create_currency call in init() compiles. The OTW struct must match the module name uppercased (DEMO) and have only the drop ability. Pass the OTW by value into init.
